description: Text Mixer App - A React Native Expo app that takes two text inputs, sends them to Claude AI to creatively mix them, with polished animations and ElevenLabs voice integration

userStories.title: App Configuration & Environment Setup
userStories.description: As a developer, I need proper project configuration for expo-router, reanimated, and environment variables.
acceptanceCriteria: app.json / app.config.js configured for expo-router scheme
Babel config includes react-native-reanimated/plugin
.env file with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and ELEVENLABS_API_KEY placeholders
.env added to .gitignore
Entry point set up for expo-router (index.ts exports expo-router)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Foundation story - must be done first. Convert from registerRootComponent to expo-router entry point.

userStories.title: Navigation & Screen Transitions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to set up expo-router with 4 screen files in a linear flow.
acceptanceCriteria: File-based routing with expo-router: 4 screen files in app/ directory
Layout file (app/_layout.tsx) with stack navigator configured
Linear flow only - no back navigation (forward + Mix Again reset)
Screen files: app/index.tsx (Text 1), app/text2.tsx (Text 2), app/mixing.tsx (Mixing), app/result.tsx (Result)
Basic placeholder content on each screen with navigation buttons
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Set up basic navigation skeleton. Custom transitions will be enhanced in later stories.

userStories.title: Claude API Integration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to integrate the Claude API to perform the text mixing operation.
acceptanceCriteria: API service module at services/claude.ts
API key read from .env file (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) via expo-constants
Style Transfer prompt: Rewrite Text 1 in the style of Text 2
Mashup prompt: Creatively combine these two texts into one
Proper error handling: timeout, network failure, invalid response
Response parsed and returned as string
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Backend service only - no UI changes. Will be consumed by mixing screen.

userStories.title: Capture Text 1 Screen
userStories.description: As a user, I want to type my first piece of text so that it can be used as input for mixing.
acceptanceCriteria: Screen displays Text 1 header
Multiline text input field with keyboard support
Continue button is disabled until text is non-empty
When user taps Continue, navigates to Screen 2 passing text1 as param
Clean minimal design with dark background and accent colors
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Mic button and pill animation will be added in later stories (US-006, transitions enhancement).

userStories.title: Capture Text 2 with Text 1 Preview and Mode Selector
userStories.description: As a user, I want to enter my second text while seeing my first text and selecting a mixing mode.
acceptanceCriteria: Screen displays Text 2 header
Text 1 appears as a pill/badge at the top of the screen
Same input pattern as Screen 1 (multiline text field)
Mode selector toggle between Style Transfer and Mashup (segmented control)
Mix them button is disabled until text is non-empty
Tapping Mix them navigates to mixing screen with text1, text2, and mode as params
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Mic button will be added in US-006.

userStories.title: Mixing Animation Screen
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see an engaging animation while the AI processes my texts.
acceptanceCriteria: Both texts shown as visual pill/orb elements
At least one Reanimated-driven animation: orbiting or merging effect
Indeterminate progress indicator present
Haptic feedback fires when mixing starts (medium impact)
Haptic feedback fires when mixing completes (success notification)
Claude API is called with selected mixing mode prompt
On API completion, animation resolves and transitions to result screen
Error state: if API fails, show error message with Try Again button
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Uses claude.ts service from US-005. Gradient glow effects optional.

userStories.title: Result Reveal Screen
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see the mixed result with a satisfying reveal animation.
acceptanceCriteria: Result text animates in with a typewriter effect or fade-in
Sound effect plays on reveal (bundle a short chime .mp3 or use expo-av tone)
Label shows mixing mode used (Style Transfer or Mashup)
Mix Again button resets state and navigates back to Screen 1
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Listen button will be added in US-007.

userStories.title: ElevenLabs STT Integration (Voice Input)
userStories.description: As a user, I want to record my voice and have it transcribed to text for hands-free input.
acceptanceCriteria: Microphone button on both text capture screens (Screen 1 and Screen 2)
Tapping mic starts recording via expo-av; visual indicator shows recording
Tapping again ends recording, sends audio to ElevenLabs STT API
Transcribed text populates the input field
API key read from .env file (ELEVENLABS_API_KEY)
Error handling: permission denied, API failure, empty transcription
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Add mic button to existing Screen 1 and Screen 2.

userStories.title: ElevenLabs TTS Integration (Listen to Result)
userStories.description: As a user, I want to listen to the mixed result read aloud.
acceptanceCriteria: Listen button on result screen
Tapping sends result text to ElevenLabs TTS API
Audio streams/plays back via expo-av
Loading state while TTS is generating
Button toggles to stop if audio is playing
Error handling for API failure
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Add Listen button to existing result screen.
